challenge.title: Dodaj Slike na Svoj Veb Sajt
challenge.description:
Mozete dodati slike na svoj sajt koristeci img element i navodjenjem URL adrese slike preko src atributa.

Primer:

<img src="https://www.freecatphotoapp.com/your-image.jpg">

Zapamtite da je img prazni element.

Svi img elementi moraju imati alt atribut. Tekst unutar alt atributa koriste citaci ekrana radi bolje pristupacnosti, a prikazuje se i kada slika ne moze da se ucita.

Napomena: Ako je slika samo dekorativna, dobra praksa je koristiti prazan alt atribut.

Uopsteno, alt atribut ne treba da sadrzi specijalne karaktere osim ako su neophodni.

Dodajmo alt atribut nasem img primeru iznad:

<img src="https://www.freecatphotoapp.com/your-image.jpg" alt="freeCodeCamp logo">
challenge.instructions:
Hajde da dodamo sliku na nas sajt:

Unutar postojeceg main elementa postavite img element pre postojecih p elemenata.

Zatim postavite src atribut da pokazuje na URL https://cdn.freecodecamp.org/curriculum/cat-photo-app/relaxing-cat.jpg.

Na kraju, ne zaboravite da svom img elementu dodate alt atribut sa prikladnim tekstom.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
CatPhotoApp

Kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff.

Purr jump eat the grass rip the couch scratched sunbathe, shed everywhere rip the couch sleep in the sink fluffy fur catnip scratched.

tests.text: Vasa stranica treba da ima element slike.
Vasa slika treba da ima src atribut koji pokazuje na sliku macke.
alt atribut vaseg elementa slike ne treba da bude prazan.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
The best page ever

Cat ipsum dolor sit amet, jump launch to pounce upon little yarn mouse, bare fangs at toy run hide in litter box until treats are fed. Go into a room to decide you didn't want to be in there anyway. I like big cats and i can not lie kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff. Meow i could pee on this if i had the energy for slap owner's face at 5am until human fills food dish yet scamper. Knock dish off table head butt cant eat out of my own dish scratch the furniture. Make meme, make cute face. Sleep in the bathroom sink chase laser but pee in the shoe. Paw at your fat belly licks your face and eat grass, throw it back up kitty ipsum dolor sit amet, shed everywhere shed everywhere stretching attack your ankles chase the red dot, hairball run catnip eat the grass sniff.
